steps.description:
A `First Name` is the only required(*) field.
Let's give this person a name.
steps.label: First Name
steps.title: First Name

steps.description:
Add a `Last Name`.
The `Last Name` field is required if you want to create a family from this person.
After saving, a `Full Name` field will appear and auto-populate.
steps.label: Last Name
steps.title: Last Name

steps.description: Let's not bother adding a photo now, but if you were to add a photo, it will be displayed at the top left of this form after the document is saved.
steps.label: Photo
steps.title: Photo

steps.description:
Let's check this box to set this person as a member of the church.
Additional fields will be displayed to track the membership date and status.
steps.label: Is Member
steps.title: Membership

steps.description:
A membership date is required when checking the `Is Member` box.
Let's choose today's date as the membership date.
steps.label: Membership Date
steps.title: Membership Date

steps.description: Let's set this person as an `Active` member, but note that additional `Membership Status Type`s can be created directly from the drop-down list.
steps.label: Membership Status
steps.title: Membership Status

steps.description:
Select the `Church` this person belongs to.
This links the person to their church congregation.
steps.label: Church
steps.title: Church

steps.description:
You can define `Church Position`s that this person has been or is currently assigned.
Go ahead and assign this person a 'Secretary' position starting today by clicking on the `Add Row` button below.
steps.label: Positions
steps.title: Church Position
